prompts: Create a simple HTML page with a heading and a paragraph.
Build an HTML page with a navigation bar containing three links: Home, About, Contact.
Generate an HTML document with a table displaying 5 rows and 3 columns of sample data.
Create a basic HTML form with fields for name, email, and a submit button.
Write an HTML page that includes an image and a caption below it.
Create an HTML layout with a header, main content area, and footer.
Build an HTML page with an ordered and unordered list.
Generate an HTML page with embedded CSS to style a button with hover effects.
Create a responsive HTML page using a simple flexbox layout.
Write an HTML document that includes a video player with controls.
Create an HTML page with a login form styled using inline CSS.
Build an HTML page with a sidebar and main content using CSS grid.
Generate an HTML page that includes a dropdown menu navigation.
Create an HTML document with semantic elements like <article>, <section>, and <aside>.
Write an HTML page that displays a product card with image, title, price, and button.
Create an HTML page with a contact form including validation attributes.
Build an HTML page that uses Google Fonts and custom typography.
Generate an HTML page with a dark mode toggle using basic JavaScript.
Create an HTML layout mimicking a blog post page with comments section.
Write an HTML page that includes a responsive image gallery.
Create an HTML page with a fixed header and scrollable content.
Build an HTML page that includes a progress bar styled with CSS.
Generate an HTML page with tabs that switch content using JavaScript.
Create an HTML form with radio buttons, checkboxes, and a dropdown.
Write an HTML page that embeds a map using an iframe.
Create an HTML page with a modal popup triggered by a button.
Build an HTML page with a pricing table featuring three plans.
Generate an HTML page with a sticky sidebar navigation.
Create an HTML page with animations using CSS keyframes.
Write an HTML page that includes a countdown timer using JavaScript.
Create an HTML dashboard layout with cards and charts placeholders.
Build an HTML page that mimics a social media post feed.
Generate an HTML page with a multi-step form wizard.
Create an HTML page that uses ARIA roles for accessibility.
Write an HTML page with a collapsible accordion component.
Create an HTML page that includes breadcrumb navigation.
Build an HTML page with a responsive navbar that collapses on mobile.
Generate an HTML page that displays a calendar layout.
Create an HTML page with a file upload form and preview section.
Write an HTML page that includes syntax-highlighted code blocks.
Create an HTML page with drag-and-drop functionality using JavaScript.
Build an HTML page that includes a carousel/slider component.
Generate an HTML page that mimics an e-commerce checkout flow.
Create an HTML page with a search bar that filters a list dynamically.
Write an HTML page that includes a notification/toast system.
Create an HTML page with a timeline component showing events.
Build an HTML page with a rating system using stars.
Generate an HTML page that includes a chatbot UI interface.
Create an HTML page that visualises hierarchical data using nested lists.
Write an HTML page that simulates a Kanban board with draggable cards.
